Sweden.md

Sweden.md is a curated, bilingual, Markdown-first knowledge base about Sweden.
It is designed for both human readers and AI systems.

Primary site: https://sweden.com.tw
Feed: https://sweden.com.tw/feed.xml
Graph: https://sweden.com.tw/graph
Resources: https://sweden.com.tw/resources
Map: https://sweden.com.tw/map

Key principles:
- Curated, not encyclopedic
- Source-based, not hand-wavy
- Layered reading depth
- Bilingual structure in zh-TW and English

Important sections:
- Home: /
- English home: /en
- About: /about
- Contribute: /contribute
- Changelog: /changelog

Content source of truth:
- Markdown content originates from knowledge/
- Site content is projected into src/content/
